upgrade_desc_business: For your team of 5, including all in Pro, plus:
upgrade_point_pro_2: Authenticate signers' identities with SMS one-time password
upgrade_point_pro_3: Apply advanced fields, including radio button and checkbox
upgrade_point_business_1: Admin Console: manage members, task progress, company info all-in-one-place
upgrade_point_business_3: Request unlimited attachments from each signer
upgrade_tip_pro: 9.99 USD per month, get Annual Plan to save up to 50%
upgrade_tip_business: 9.49 USD per user per month, 40% off for annual plan

is_photo_on_sign: Is this field required to take a photo when signing?
photo_on_sign_hint: When the signer signs, a photo will be taken to record the signer's identity.
is_required_file: Yes, the signer is required to upload an attachment
is_downloaded: Is this attachment downloaded during the signing process?
is_downloaded_file: Yes, it can be downloaded by other signers before all parties

modal_auth_verify_apply:
The task requires you to verify your identity with verify_type.
Please prepare your card reader and IC card, and go to Chunghwa Telecom's commercial certificate application platform to apply.
After the application is completed, please return to DottedSign to complete the signing.
modal_auth_verify_verifying: The identity verification letter has been sent to signer_email through Chunghwa Telecom. Please verify and return to the page to continue.
modal_auth_verify_fal: Certificate verification failed. Please refresh the page to sign again, or contact the administrator for assistance.

save_as_template_description:
Save the task as a reusable template.
Note: The template includes document files, field settings, and recipient information. Other settings will use default values.
duplicate_template_description:
Duplicate an existing template and create a new template.
Note: The new template will include all settings from the original template, including document files, field settings, and recipient information.

enterprise_cta_modal_body:
Thank you for deploying and using the free open-source version of DottedSign!
To meet higher corporate operational standards, we offer commercial licensing solutions designed for enterprise scalability:
  • Certificate Verification & Compliance: Integrate Natural Person, Business, and System Certificates. Embed visual certificates and audit trails directly into PDFs to enhance non-repudiation and security.
  • Diverse Business Scenarios: Unlock the "In-Person Signing" module. Create digital tasks on-site using templates, perfectly matching counter services or face-to-face transactions.
  • Cross-Departmental Access Control: Establish corporate hierarchies with flexible member permissions and groups to enforce strict internal data and file isolation.
  • Enterprise Security & Maintenance: Benefit from dedicated technical support and the latest system updates.
Contact us to receive our commercial package details and a tailored quotation.
desc_completion_password: This password is used to open and view the PDF file after signing is completed.
